summary: Joel announces the European leg of the FogBugz World Tour, noting that Dublin and London events are fully booked. He mentions a separate speaking engagement at the Irish Java Technology Conference. Additional availability remains in Cambridge, Amsterdam, and Copenhagen, and a new afternoon demo has been added in Delft.
key_points: Dublin and London FogBugz tour stops are sold out with waiting lists
Joel is giving a separate talk at the Irish Java Technology Conference
New demo location added in Delft at the Sociëteit Het Meisjeshuis
money_quotes: Dublin and London are completely full.
This talk is completely different than the FogBugz World Tour, so if you go to both, you won't be bored.
key_insight: This is a brief logistics post promoting the European FogBugz World Tour with no substantive technical or management content.
